name: My New Brownie
recipeIngredient: 6 squares unsweetened baking chocolate, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 9-inch square baking pan with foil, allowing ends to extend above the sides on two sides.
3. Melt chocolate and butter in microwave or over very low heat in a medium saucepan, stirring frequently until smooth. Let cool for 5 minutes.
4. Whisk together sugar and vanilla extract until blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, whisking until just combined.
6. Continue whisking until the mixture is velvety.
7. Gradually add flour and whisk until incorporated.
8. Stir in chopped walnuts (if using).
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until the top cracks near the edges and a tester inserted in the center comes out with moist crumbs.
11. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
12. Cut into 16 squares and remove from foil.
